---
title: "Sharing PhD Study and Scholarship Application Experiences"
date: 2026-04-29
---

```{=html}
<p class="back-to-main"><a href="https://leslie-lu.github.io/talks/">&larr; Back to talks &middot; leslie-lu.github.io</a></p>

<div class="talk-header">
  <p class="talk-title">Sharing PhD Study and Scholarship Application Experiences</p>
  <p class="talk-meta">
    <strong>Speaker:</strong> Zhen Lu &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;
    <strong>Date:</strong> April 29, 2026 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;
    <strong>Venue:</strong> School of Public Health (Shenzhen), Sun Yat-sen University, Shenzhen, China
  </p>
</div>
```

## Overview

This talk was delivered as an invited session for graduate students at the School of Public Health (Shenzhen), Sun Yat-sen University. It covers practical experiences and reflections on:

- Navigating a PhD program in epidemiology and biostatistics
- Applying for domestic and international scholarships
- Balancing research, coursework, and personal growth
- Lessons learned from the publication process

## Downloads

```{=html}
<div class="download-actions">
  <a class="btn btn-success companion-download" target="_blank" href="slides/slides.pdf" role="button">{{< fa file-pdf >}} &ensp;Download slides (PDF)</a>
  <a class="btn btn-success companion-download" target="_blank" href="slides/bilingual_speech_script.pdf" role="button">{{< fa file-alt >}} &ensp;Download bilingual speech script</a>
</div>
```
